mission: Create a high-impact, uniquely designed tenant mobile app for Kenya that breaks generic conventions.

typography.installation_note: Ensure @expo-google-fonts/plus-jakarta-sans and @expo-google-fonts/dm-sans are installed and loaded in _layout.js.

layout_strategies.safe_area: Always wrap screen content in SafeAreaView (from react-native-safe-area-context).
layout_strategies.scroll_view: Use ScrollView for forms/content, FlatList for long lists (Notices, Tickets).
layout_strategies.keyboard: Wrap forms in KeyboardAvoidingView (behavior='padding' on iOS, 'height' on Android).
layout_strategies.grid: For Quick Actions, use flexWrap: 'wrap' with width: '48%' and gap.

Button.style: Rounded pill shape or slightly rounded rectangle (radius 12). Primary uses #064E3B with white text. Ghost variant uses transparent bg with accent text.
Button.interaction: Use TouchableOpacity with activeOpacity={0.8}. Add slight scale animation on press if possible.

Card.style: bg-surface rounded-xl p-4 shadow-sm (elevation 2 on Android, shadowOpacity 0.1 on iOS).

Input.style: Bordered rounded-lg (border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700). Height 50px. Label above, error text below.

TicketCard.style: Row layout. Left side: Priority indicator strip. content: Title, Category Pill, Date. Right: Chevron.

auth_hero.description: Modern apartment interior for Auth/Coming Soon screen background

home_family.description: Happy family for 'Find a Home' or community section

maintenance_tools.description: Tools for Create Ticket header or category visual

universal_guidelines: ALL text must be wrapped in <Text> component. No raw strings in Views.
Do NOT use 'className' or Tailwind classes unless NativeWind is configured (assume it is NOT). Use StyleSheet.create().
Use 'data-testid' on all TouchableOpacity and TextInput elements for testing.
Dark Mode: Do not use pure black (#000000). Use #121212 or #1E1E1E to reduce smear on OLED screens.
Navigation: Use 'expo-router'. Create files in 'app/' directory. Use 'Link' or 'router.push()'.
Avoid Z-Index wars. Rely on natural stacking order where possible.
Images: Use 'expo-image' (Image) for better caching and performance.
Signature: For lease signing, if 'react-native-signature-canvas' is not available, use a placeholder View with dashed border and 'Signature Canvas Placeholder' text.
instructions_to_main_agent: Start by setting up the constants/Colors.js and hooks/useTheme.js (or simple Context). Then build the Tab Layout in app/_layout.js. Implement Auth screen first with the toggle. Build Home Dashboard with the Bento Grid for actions. Ensure M-Pesa flow looks secure and trustworthy.
